rows.label: tlk47300164_02_msg0001
rows.name:
The village is as always,
but the air feels wrong...
I have a bad feeling.

rows.label: tlk47300164_02_msg0002
rows.name:
I've heard that Iira are responsible
for terrible wrongdoings, but do they
have anything to gain by coming here?

rows.label: tlk47300164_02_msg0003
rows.name:
We don't have soldiers here. We
can't fight like Superbia. We can
only pray to the Guardian...
